name: Dynagas LNG Partners LP 8.75% Series B Fixed to Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units liquidation preference $25.00 per Uni
summary: Dynagas LNG Partners LP 8.75% Series B Fixed to Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units liquidation preference $25.00 per Uni are preferred equity units of a master limited partnership (MLP) focused on owning and operating LNG carriers. These units offer a fixed-to-floating dividend rate and have liquidation preference over common units, representing a claim on the partnership's assets. Dynagas LNG Partners transports liquefied natural gas worldwide.
